# Code of Conduct

This project follows the
[Contributor Covenant v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

In short: be excellent to each other. Disagree about technical
decisions, not about people. Assume good faith. If something feels off,
report it via [security advisories](https://github.com/RFingAdam/mcp-ltspice-qucs/security/advisories)
(use "Report a vulnerability" — works for conduct issues too).
